title: Linode Instance
description: A Linode compute instance representing a virtual machine running on the Akamai Connected Cloud platform. Instances have configurable CPU, memory, storage, and networking resources and can be deployed from distribution images or custom images.

id.description: The unique identifier for this Linode instance.

label.description: The display label for this Linode instance. Must begin with a letter and may only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.

region.description: The region identifier where this Linode instance is deployed, such as us-east or eu-west.

type.description: The Linode plan type identifier that determines the instance's hardware resources and pricing.

image.description: The image identifier used to deploy this Linode instance, or null if deployed from a backup.

status.description: The current operational status of the Linode instance.

ipv4.description: The IPv4 addresses assigned to this Linode instance.

ipv6.description: The IPv6 SLAAC address for this Linode instance.

created.description: The date and time when this Linode instance was created.

updated.description: The date and time when this Linode instance was last updated.

tags.description: User-defined tags applied to this Linode instance for organizational purposes.

hypervisor.description: The virtualization hypervisor this Linode instance runs on.

watchdog_enabled.description: Whether the Lassie watchdog is enabled to automatically restart this instance if it powers off unexpectedly.

InstanceSpecs.description: The hardware specifications for this Linode instance based on its plan type.

disk.description: The total disk space in megabytes.

vcpus.description: The number of virtual CPU cores.

gpus.description: The number of GPUs, if applicable.

transfer.description: The monthly network transfer quota in gigabytes.

InstanceAlerts.description: Alert thresholds for monitoring this Linode instance.

cpu.description: The CPU usage percentage threshold for alerts.

io.description: The disk IO rate threshold for alerts.

network_in.description: The incoming network traffic threshold in Mb/s for alerts.

network_out.description: The outgoing network traffic threshold in Mb/s for alerts.

transfer_quota.description: The transfer quota usage percentage threshold for alerts.

BackupInfo.description: Information about the backup service for this Linode instance.

enabled.description: Whether the backup service is enabled for this instance.

available.description: Whether any backups are currently available for restoration.

day.description: The day of the week for weekly automatic backups.

window.description: The two-hour UTC window for daily automatic backups.
